docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY JUDGE PRO TEM MARGARET WU. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ASHOK AGGARWAL IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT IAN MILLER IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
REMARK: RECEIVED RETURNED MAILED FROM THE POST OFFICE ON NOV 14/25. SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION, MAILED TO ASHOK AGGARWAL. RETURN TO SENDER, UNCLAIMED, UNABLE TO FORWARD.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,499.00 FILED BY AGGARWAL, ASHOK AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, IAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
